results.rendered_html:
rasā
1 The lower or infernal regions, hell.
2 The earth, ground, soil;  Bv. 1. 59 ; smarasya yuddharaṃgatāṃ rasārasāra sārasā  Nalod. 2. 10. 
3 The tongue.
4 A vine or grapes.
5 Ved. Moisture.
Comp.
— okas m. an inhabitant of the lower world.
— khataḥ a cock.
— talaṃ
1 N. of one of the seven regions below the earth; see pātāla.
2 the lower world or hell in general; rājyaṃ yātu rasātalaṃ punaridaṃ na prāṇituṃ kāmaye  Bv. 2. 63 ; or jātiryātu rasātalaṃ  Bh. 2. 39. 
— pāyin m. a dog.
